name: review-order-api
prompt: hey can you bug-review my order API changes? File is evals/fixtures/api-orders.ts — it's an Express REST API for orders. Do the full bug-review workflow please.
expected_output: Structured review using parallel passes, voting, and validation with findings in the standard format
assertions: At least one finding identifies an injection vulnerability
No finding targets the GET /orders/:id endpoint
Each finding has a valid severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
